requirements.full_sentence:
Short Title and Commencement
(1) These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Bank Prepaid
Payment Instruments Issuers - Internal Ombudsman) Directions, 2026.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Non-Bank Prepaid Payment Instruments Issuers - Internal Ombudsman) Directions, 2026

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect except clause 7(2),
14(2) and 14(4) which shall be complied with, latest by June 30, 2026.
requirements.object: immediate effect except clause 7(2), 14(2) and 14(4) which shall be complied with, latest by June 30, 2026

conditions: if it is satisfied that it is expedient so to do
requirements.full_sentence:
Suspension
(1) The Reserve Bank, if it is satisfied that it is expedient so to do, may, by an order,
suspend for such period as may be specified in the order, the operation of any or all of
the provisions of these Directions, either generally or in relation to any specified regulated
entity.
requirements.object: suspend for such period as may be specified in the order, the operation of any or all of the provisions of these Directions, either gen

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(2) The Reserve Bank may by an order, extend from time to time, the period of any
suspension ordered as aforesaid by such period, as it may deem fit.
requirements.object: from time to time, the period of any suspension ordered as aforesaid by such period, as it may deem fit

requirements.full_sentence:
Applicability
(1) These Directions shall be applicable to Non-Bank Prepaid Payment Instruments
Issuers (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'PPI issuers' and individually as a 'PPI
issuer') as defined under clause 4(1)(h) of these Directions and having more than one
crore Prepaid Payment Instruments outstanding as on March 31, 2025, or thereafter.
requirements.object: Prepaid Payment Instruments Issuers (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'PPI issuers' and individually as a 'PPI issuer

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The directions shall also be applicable to the PPI issuers, which meets the above
mentioned criteria after March 31, 2025, with effect from six months from meeting the
eligibility criteria.
requirements.object: the PPI issuers, which meets the above mentioned criteria after March 31, 2025, with effect from six months from meeting the eli

requirements.full_sentence:
The directions shall continue to remain applicable to a PPI issuer, even
if the number of Prepaid Payment Instruments outstanding falls below the threshold at a
later date.
requirements.object: to a PPI issuer, even if the number of Prepaid Payment Instruments outstanding falls below the threshold at a later date

requirements.full_sentence:
Definitions
(1) In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear
the meanings assigned to them as below:
requirements.object: to them as below:

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) "Competent Authority" means Managing Director/ Chief Executive Officer of
the PPI issuer;
requirements.object: Officer of the PPI issuer
or through other modes alleging deficiency in service on the part of the PPI issuer with or without seeking relief thereon

requirements.full_sentence:
(c) "Customer" means a person who uses, or is an applicant for, a service provided
by the PPI issuer;
requirements.object: or is an applicant for, a service provided by the PPI issuer
otherwise, which may or may not result in financial loss or damage to the customer

requirements.full_sentence:
IO)" means any person appointed under
clause 6 of these Directions;
requirements.object: clause 6 of these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
(f) "Financial Sector Regulatory Body" means regulatory body for financial sector
entities and includes:
<image>
requirements.object: sector entities and includes: <image>

requirements.full_sentence:
(g) "Internal Ombudsman (IO)" means any person appointed under clause 5 of
these Directions;
requirements.object: clause 5 of these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
(h) "Non-Bank Prepaid Payment Instruments Issuer" means a company, as defined
in the Companies Act, 2013, which has been granted a Certificate of Authorisation
by the Reserve Bank of India under Section 7(1) of the Payment and Settlement
Systems Act, 2007 (51 of 2007) to operate as a Prepaid Payment Instrument
Issuer (PPI);
requirements.object: in the Companies Act, 2013, which has been granted a Certificate of Authorisation by the Reserve Bank of India under Section 7(1

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) "Regulated Entity (RE)" means a commercial bank or payments bank or small
finance bank or a non-banking financial company or a non-bank prepaid payment
instrument issuer or a credit information company which are covered under the
purview of the Internal Ombudsman framework, or any other entity as may be
specified by the Reserve Bank from time to time.
requirements.object: Reserve Bank from time to time

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as
assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, the Reserve Bank of India
Act, 1934, the Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007, the Credit Information
Companies (Regulation) Act, 2005, the Credit Information Companies Rules, 2006, the
Credit Information Companies Regulations, 2006, or the Reserve Bank - Integrated
Ombudsman Scheme (as amended from time to time) or regulations, directions and
guidelines issued by the Reserve Bank of India.
requirements.object: as assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, the Payment and Settlement Syst

requirements.full_sentence:
Appointment of Internal Ombudsman
(1) The IO shall either be a retired or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a General
Manager in the RE under the purview of the Internal Ombudsman framework or a
Financial Sector Regulatory Body, having necessary skills and experience of minimum
seven years of working in areas such as banking, non-banking finance, regulation,
supervision, payment and settlement systems, credit information or consumer protection.
requirements.object: or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a General Manager in the RE under the purview of the Internal Ombudsman framework or

conditions: if the person is a serving officer
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, if the person is a serving officer, he / she is required to relinquish
the same before assuming charge as IO.
requirements.object: before assuming charge as IO

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The IO shall previously not have been employed, nor presently be employed, by
the PPI issuer or a holding, associate or subsidiary company of the PPI issuer.
requirements.object: employed, nor presently be employed, by the PPI issuer or a holding, associate or subsidiary company of the PPI issuer

requirements.full_sentence: (3) The IO shall not be over 70 years of age before the completion of the tenure.
requirements.object: of age before the completion of the tenure

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) A person may work as the IO in more than one RE simultaneously at the discretion
of the REs concerned, subject to the approval of the Board or Customer Service
Committee / Consumer Protection Committee of the Board of the appointing RE.
requirements.object: in more than one RE simultaneously at the discretion of the REs concerned

requirements.full_sentence:
IO shall either be a retired or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a
Deputy General Manager in the RE under the purview of the Internal Ombudsman
framework or a Financial Sector Regulatory Body, having necessary skills and experience
of minimum five years of working in areas such as banking, non-banking finance,
regulation, supervision, payment and settlement systems, credit information or consumer
protection.
requirements.object: or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a Deputy General Manager in the RE under the purview of the Internal Ombudsman frame

conditions: if the person is a serving officer
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, if the person is a serving officer, he / she is required to relinquish
the same before assuming charge as Dy.
requirements.object: before assuming charge as Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO shall previously not have been employed, nor presently be employed,
by the PPI issuer or a holding, associate or subsidiary company of the PPI issuer.
requirements.object: employed, nor presently be employed, by the PPI issuer or a holding, associate or subsidiary company of the PPI issuer

requirements.full_sentence: IO shall not be over 70 years of age before the completion of the tenure.
requirements.object: of age before the completion of the tenure

requirements.full_sentence: IO shall not be employed in more than one RE simultaneously.
requirements.object: than one RE simultaneously

requirements.full_sentence:
Number of Internal Ombudsman / Deputy Internal Ombudsman
(1) Every eligible PPI issuer shall appoint at least one IO.
requirements.object: IO

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The Board of the PPI issuer shall determine, at least once in a year, the number
of IO/ Dy.
requirements.object: in a year, the number of IO/ Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO, the PPI issuer shall consider the need for
diversity of experience of the incumbents to deal with different types of cases.
requirements.object: diversity of experience of the incumbents to deal with different types of cases

requirements.full_sentence:
In such
cases, the PPI issuer may clearly define the jurisdiction of each IO / Dy.
requirements.object: of each IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence: IO in the PPI issuer shall be contractual.

(2) The PPI issuer shall ensure that the post of the IO does not remain vacant at any
point of time.
requirements.object: of the IO does not remain vacant at any point of time

conditions: where both IO/s and Dy IO/s are on leave / absent
requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In a rare case where both IO/s and Dy IO/s are on leave / absent, the PPI issuer
may designate its serving official equivalent to the General Manager rank as the IO for a
period not exceeding one month, with the approval of the Board.
requirements.object: equivalent to the General Manager rank as the IO for a period not exceeding one month, with the approval of the Board

requirements.full_sentence:
Such official shall not
have any reporting relationship with the business verticals of the PPI issuer during the
period in which he/she is designated as the IO.
requirements.object: with the business verticals of the PPI issuer during the period in which he/she is designated as the IO

requirements.full_sentence:
IO in the PPI issuer shall be a fixed term of not less than
three years.
requirements.object: of not less than three years

requirements.full_sentence: IO in the PPI issuer shall not exceed five years.

(5) To fill a vacancy, the PPI issuer shall undertake the process of fresh appointment
at least three months in advance of the expiry of the tenure of the incumbent IO and
ensure that there is a reasonable overlap between the time of demitting of office of the
outgoing IO and the incoming IO.
requirements.object: fresh appointment at least three months in advance of the expiry of the tenure of the incumbent IO and ensure that there is a

requirements.full_sentence:
IO shall not be removed before the completion of his/her contracted
term without the approval of the Board.
requirements.object: completion of his/her contracted term without the approval of the Board

conditions:
In case a vacancy arises on account of reasons
beyond the control of the PPI issuer (such as resignation
requirements.timeline:
within 10 working days from the
date of such vacancy and shall appoint a new IO
requirements.full_sentence:
In case a vacancy arises on account of reasons
beyond the control of the PPI issuer (such as resignation, incapacitation, illness, death,
<image>
etc.), the PPI issuer shall inform Reserve Bank of India within 10 working days from the
date of such vacancy and shall appoint a new IO / Dy.
requirements.object: India within 10 working days from the date of such vacancy and shall appoint a new IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
(7) The Board of the PPI issuer shall determine the structure of emoluments, facilities
and benefits accorded to the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: emoluments, facilities and benefits accorded to the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO, which should be appropriate keeping in view
the stature and position of the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: view the stature and position of the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence: IO, once determined, shall not be changed adversely during the tenure of the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: the tenure of the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
Administrative Oversight
(1) The IO shall report to the Competent Authority, as defined under clause 4(1)(a) of
the Directions, of the PPI issuer administratively, and to the Board of the PPI issuer
functionally.
requirements.object: Authority, as defined under clause 4(1)(a) of the Directions, of the PPI issuer administratively, and to the Board of the PPI

requirements.full_sentence:
Secretariat of the office of Internal Ombudsman
(1) The PPI issuer shall provide such number of its officers and staff to the office of
the IO as is considered necessary for the smooth functioning of the office of the IO.
requirements.object: its officers and staff to the office of the IO as is considered necessary for the smooth functioning of the office of the IO

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) All other requisite office infrastructure, including information technology support
shall be made available to the office of the IO to enable the IO/ Dy.
requirements.object: the office of the IO to enable the IO/ Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The office of the IO may preferably be placed in the Head Office or Corporate
Office of the PPI issuer.
requirements.object: the Head Office or Corporate Office of the PPI issuer

requirements.full_sentence:
Internal Audit
(1) The Internal Audit Department of the PPI issuer shall conduct an audit of the
implementation of these Directions on an annual basis, covering, inter-alia:
requirements.object: the implementation of these Directions on an annual basis, covering, inter-alia:

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The scope of the internal audit shall exclude any assessment of the correctness of
decisions taken by the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: the correctness of decisions taken by the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
Role and Responsibilities of Internal Ombudsman / Deputy Internal
Ombudsman
(1) The office of the IO shall not handle complaints received directly from the
complainants or members of the public.
requirements.object: from the complainants or members of the public

requirements.full_sentence:
It shall deal with the complaints that have already
been examined by the PPI issuer but have been partially resolved or being wholly rejected
by the PPI issuer.
requirements.object: that have already been examined by the PPI issuer but have been partially resolved or being wholly rejected by the PPI issuer

requirements.full_sentence:
IO shall not represent the PPI issuer in legal cases before any court
or fora or authority.
requirements.object: in legal cases before any court or fora or authority

requirements.full_sentence: (3) While the IO may decide any or all complaints, the power for the Dy.
requirements.object: complaints, the power for the Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO to decide
the complaints may be defined under a policy approved by the Board.
requirements.object: policy approved by the Board

requirements.full_sentence:
IO shall recommend suitable compensation to the complainant, as
per the compensation prescribed by the Reserve Bank of India in its extant guidelines, if
any, and as per the compensation policy of the PPI issuer, if any, in case there is no
prescription from the Reserve Bank of India.
requirements.object: the complainant, as per the compensation prescribed by the Reserve Bank of India in its extant guidelines

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The IO may recommend compensation in accordance with the Reserve Bank -
Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, as amended from time to time, for any consequential
loss and the loss of time, expenses incurred and harassment / mental agony suffered by
the complainant, over and above the compensation recommended in clause 12(4).
requirements.object: with the Reserve Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, as amended from time to time, for any consequential loss and

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) The office of IO shall, on a quarterly basis, analyse the pattern of all complaints
received against the PPI issuer, such as product-wise, category-wise, consumer group-
wise, geographical location-wise, etc., and provide inputs to the PPI issuer for policy
intervention, if so warranted.
requirements.object: basis, analyse the pattern of all complaints received against the PPI issuer, such as product-wise, category-wise, consumer group- wise, geographical location-wise, etc., and provide inputs to the PPI issuer for policy intervention

requirements.full_sentence:
(7) The IO shall suggest means for taking actions to address the root cause of
complaints of similar / repeat nature and those that require policy level changes in the
PPI issuer.
requirements.object: actions to address the root cause of complaints of similar / repeat nature and those that require policy level changes in the

requirements.full_sentence:
IO shall have 'read-only' access to the Reserve Bank's Complaint
Management System to enable them to keep abreast of decisions of the RBI
<image>
Ombudsman/ Appellate Authority.
requirements.object: the Reserve Bank's Complaint Management System to enable them to keep abreast of decisions of the RBI <image> Ombudsman/ Ap

requirements.full_sentence: The PPI issuer shall seek such access for the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence: IO shall functionally report to the IO.
requirements.object: IO

requirements.full_sentence:
Board Oversight
(1) The IO shall be designated as a permanent invitee to the meetings of the Board.
requirements.object: permanent invitee to the meetings of the Board

requirements.full_sentence:
In PPI issuers having multiple IOs, a view shall be taken by the Board to have
representation of more than one IO or having a system of rotation.
requirements.object: Board to have representation of more than one IO or having a system of rotation

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The IO shall furnish periodic reports (including the analysis of complaints) on his /
her activities to the Board, preferably at quarterly, but not less than half yearly, intervals.
requirements.object: the analysis of complaints) on his / her activities to the Board, preferably at quarterly, but not less than half

requirements.full_sentence:
IO has been overruled by the
Competent Authority shall be placed before the Board of the PPI issuer for review.
requirements.object: Board of the PPI issuer for review

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) Information on the complaints resolved by the RBI Ombudsman in favour of
complainant, either partially or fully, shall also be placed before the Board, on quarterly
basis.
requirements.object: the Board, on quarterly basis

requirements.full_sentence:
The information shall be accompanied with an analysis of minimum top five
categories of complaints along with remedial measures so as to avoid complaints of a
similar nature in future.
requirements.object: analysis of minimum top five categories of complaints along with remedial measures so as to avoid complaints of a similar natur

requirements.full_sentence:
Procedure for Complaint Redress by Internal Ombudsman / Deputy Internal
Ombudsman
(1) A fully automated Complaints Management System shall be put in place by the
PPI issuer and access to the System shall be provided to the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: by the PPI issuer and access to the System shall be provided to the IO / Dy
the office of the IO for review

requirements.full_sentence: (2) The PPI issuer shall provide only three categories i.e.
requirements.object: i

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The PPI issuer shall formulate a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) for flow of
complaints and information in a time bound manner.
requirements.object: Procedure (SOP) for flow of complaints and information in a time bound manner

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The PPI issuer shall ensure that a complaint is not closed by the same branch /
unit / other touch points, whether it has been resolved (fully or partially) or rejected.
requirements.object: is not closed by the same branch / unit / other touch points, whether it has been resolved (fully or partially) or rejected

requirements.full_sentence:
A
complaint which is being wholly rejected or partially resolved shall be reviewed at a fairly
senior level, which the PPI issuer may decide as deemed fit, before sending it to the office
of IO.
requirements.object: fairly senior level, which the PPI issuer may decide as deemed fit, before sending it to the office of IO

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The following types of complaints shall be outside the purview of these Directions
and shall not be handled by the IO/ Dy.
requirements.object: IO/ Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
The PPI issuer shall forward all rejected / partially resolved complaints under the
categories (a) and (b) above to the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: partially resolved complaints under the categories (a) and (b) above to the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO, who shall look for inherent deficiency in
service in such cases and take a view whether any of these complaints can be exempted
under (a) and / or (b) above as decided by the PPI issuer.
requirements.object: in service in such cases and take a view whether any of these complaints can be exempted under (a) and / or (b) above as

requirements.full_sentence:
Complaints that are outside the
purview of these Directions shall be immediately returned back to the PPI issuer by the
IO / Dy.
requirements.object: to the PPI issuer by the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO shall examine the complaints based on records available with the
PPI issuer, including any documents submitted by the complainant and comments/
clarifications furnished by the PPI issuer to the specific queries of the IO.
requirements.object: on records available with the PPI issuer, including any documents submitted by the complainant and comments/ clarificatio

requirements.full_sentence:
IO may hold meetings with the concerned functionaries of the PPI
issuer and seek any additional record / document available with the PPI issuer that are
necessary for examining the complaint and reviewing the decision.
requirements.object: concerned functionaries of the PPI issuer and seek any additional record / document available with the PPI issuer that are nece

requirements.full_sentence:
(9) The PPI issuer shall ensure that the final decision is communicated to the
complainant within a period of 30 days from the date of receipt of complaint by the PPI
issuer.
requirements.object: decision is communicated to the complainant within a period of 30 days from the date of receipt of complaint by the PPI issuer

requirements.full_sentence: IO shall record a "reasoned decision" in each case.
requirements.object: in each case

requirements.full_sentence:
IO upholds the decision of the PPI issuer to reject or partially
resolve the complaint, the reply to the complainant should explicitly state that the said
complaint has been reviewed by the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: said complaint has been reviewed by the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO, the PPI issuer shall advise the complainant about the option of
approaching the RBI Ombudsman for redress (excluding complaints not covered under
the Reserve Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, as amended from time to time)
along with complete details of the complaint.
requirements.object: the option of approaching the RBI Ombudsman for redress (excluding complaints not covered under the Reserve Bank - Integr

requirements.full_sentence:
The PPI issuer in its reply shall also mention
the URL of Reserve Bank's Complaint Management System portal for online filing of
customer complaints (https://cms.rbi.org.in) and the physical / email address of the
Centralised Receipt and Processing Centre1.
requirements.object: of Reserve Bank's Complaint Management System portal for online filing of customer complaints (https://cms

requirements.full_sentence:
IO shall be mandatorily included in the information to be submitted by the PPI issuer
to the RBI Ombudsman if the complaint was already reviewed by the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: the information to be submitted by the PPI issuer to the RBI Ombudsman if the complaint was already reviewed by the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO, the PPI issuer shall necessarily
seek his/ her comments and submit the same to the RBI Ombudsman.
requirements.object: comments and submit the same to the RBI Ombudsman

requirements.full_sentence: (14) The PPI issuer shall use the analysis of complaints handled by IO / Dy.
requirements.object: complaints handled by IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO may also be involved in
such trainings, where necessary.
requirements.object: such trainings

requirements.full_sentence:
IO towards developing uniformity across the PPI
issuer in the redress of complaints, the Board shall also analyse the number of cases
where there is substantive difference between the decisions of the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: of cases where there is substantive difference between the decisions of the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
(16) The PPI issuer shall widely disseminate the guidelines / instructions regarding
these Directions among the staff while communicating the appointment of IO/ Dy.
requirements.object: / instructions regarding these Directions among the staff while communicating the appointment of IO/ Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
1 Centralized Receipt and Processing Centre (CRPC) Reserve Bank of India, Central Vista, Sector 17, Chandigarh - 160 017 (email: crpc@rbi.org.in)
<image>
(17) The PPI issuer shall not provide the contact details of the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: of the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO shall not handle complaints received directly from the
customers.
requirements.object: from the customers

requirements.full_sentence:
Supervisory Oversight
(1) The areas relating to customer service and customer grievance redress, as well
as the implementation of these Directions, shall be a part of the supervisory review by the
Department of Payment and Settlement Systems of the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: the supervisory review by the Department of Payment and Settlement Systems of the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Consumer Education and Protection Department of the Reserve Bank may review
the cases where the decision of the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: the decision of the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO has not been accepted by the PPI issuer
and the aggrieved complainant approaches the RBI Ombudsman, for assessing the
effectiveness of the internal grievance redress mechanism of the PPI issuer and initiating
corrective actions as it may deem fit.

Reporting to Reserve Bank
(1) The PPI issuer shall, within five working days of appointment of the IO or Dy.
requirements.object: days of appointment of the IO or Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
Date of intimation to the Reserve Bank
(2) The PPI issuer shall put in place a system of periodic reporting of information to the
Consumer Education and Protection Department, Central Office, Reserve Bank of India,
on a quarterly basis as per format provided in the Annexure.
requirements.object: system of periodic reporting of information to the Consumer Education and Protection Department, Central Office, Reserve Bank of India,

requirements.full_sentence:
The report shall be
<image>
submitted on or before the 15th day of the month following the quarter to which it relates
to.
requirements.object: or before the 15th day of the month following the quarter to which it relates to

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) All appointments / actions under the aforesaid Master Direction, prior to the coming
into effect of these Directions, shall be deemed to have been made under these
Directions.
requirements.object: been made under these Directions
